markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on website migration, performance, and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/CkndUGJEPxtBhvdmfepbSJPyF4zHF5xn?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Website Migration:** A 6–8 week migration to WordPress is starting. GrowthX will review the sitemap to identify content for repurposing and propose redirects for legacy pages.](https://fathom.video/share/CkndUGJEPxtBhvdmfepbSJPyF4zHF5xn?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
  - [**Performance Anomaly:** A `utm_source=chatgpt` parameter is appearing on direct visits, but it does not inflate Scrunch's LLM visibility metrics, which are based on simulated queries.](https://fathom.video/share/CkndUGJEPxtBhvdmfepbSJPyF4zHF5xn?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** New series on "Operating Strategy" and "Data Readiness" are in development, focusing on human-AI collaboration and lower-funnel topics like preparing for AI.](https://fathom.video/share/CkndUGJEPxtBhvdmfepbSJPyF4zHF5xn?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
  - [**Messaging Stack:** A new messaging stack is in development to define consistent terminology and map Imubit's solution to a customer maturity journey (Define → Measure → Augment → Automate).](https://fathom.video/share/CkndUGJEPxtBhvdmfepbSJPyF4zHF5xn?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

## Topics

### Website Migration & Content Strategy

  - [**Problem:** The current site has significant technical and content issues, including:](https://fathom.video/share/CkndUGJEPxtBhvdmfepbSJPyF4zHF5xn?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
      - [Inconsistent styling (e.g., mismatched corners).](https://fathom.video/share/CkndUGJEPxtBhvdmfepbSJPyF4zHF5xn?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
      - [Duplicated pages created without a clear strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/CkndUGJEPxtBhvdmfepbSJPyF4zHF5xn?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
      - [Broken legacy pages with non-functional buttons.](https://fathom.video/share/CkndUGJEPxtBhvdmfepbSJPyF4zHF5xn?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)
  - [**Solution:** A 6–8 week migration to WordPress is starting.](https://fathom.video/share/CkndUGJEPxtBhvdmfepbSJPyF4zHF5xn?tab=summary&timestamp=539.0)
      - [Tara created a sitemap to guide the migration, categorizing pages as "Keep," "Don't Keep," or "Review."](https://fathom.video/share/CkndUGJEPxtBhvdmfepbSJPyF4zHF5xn?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
      - [GrowthX will review the sitemap to identify valuable content (e.g., case studies, images) for repurposing and propose a redirect strategy for legacy pages.](https://fathom.video/share/CkndUGJEPxtBhvdmfepbSJPyF4zHF5xn?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [**New Content Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/CkndUGJEPxtBhvdmfepbSJPyF4zHF5xn?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
      - [**"Operating Strategy":** Merging human expertise with AI.](https://fathom.video/share/CkndUGJEPxtBhvdmfepbSJPyF4zHF5xn?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
      - [**"Data Readiness":** A middle-of-funnel series on preparing for AI optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/CkndUGJEPxtBhvdmfepbSJPyF4zHF5xn?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)
          - [**Tone:** It's okay to start with imperfect data; a historian is not a prerequisite.](https://fathom.video/share/CkndUGJEPxtBhvdmfepbSJPyF4zHF5xn?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)
          - [**Verticals:** Chemical and Cement.](https://fathom.video/share/CkndUGJEPxtBhvdmfepbSJPyF4zHF5xn?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
      - [**"Industry 5.0":** Exploring AI + human collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/CkndUGJEPxtBhvdmfepbSJPyF4zHF5xn?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
  - [**Messaging Stack:** A new messaging stack is in development to provide a consistent framework for discussing Imubit's solution.](https://fathom.video/share/CkndUGJEPxtBhvdmfepbSJPyF4zHF5xn?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
      - [**Goal:** Define consistent terminology and map the solution to a customer maturity journey (Define → Measure → Augment → Automate).](https://fathom.video/share/CkndUGJEPxtBhvdmfepbSJPyF4zHF5xn?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)

### Performance & UTM Anomaly

  - [**Performance:** Sessions are up 6% and engaged sessions are up 9%.](https://fathom.video/share/CkndUGJEPxtBhvdmfepbSJPyF4zHF5xn?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
  - [**UTM Anomaly:** A `utm_source=chatgpt` parameter is appearing on direct visits to `imubit.com`.](https://fathom.video/share/CkndUGJEPxtBhvdmfepbSJPyF4zHF5xn?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
      - [**Impact:** This does not inflate Scrunch's LLM visibility metrics, which are based on simulated queries, not live traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/CkndUGJEPxtBhvdmfepbSJPyF4zHF5xn?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** The anomaly may be caused by a browser cookie.](https://fathom.video/share/CkndUGJEPxtBhvdmfepbSJPyF4zHF5xn?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)
      - [**Action:** Mara will investigate the root cause.](https://fathom.video/share/CkndUGJEPxtBhvdmfepbSJPyF4zHF5xn?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tara:** Share the sitemap with GrowthX (comment-only access).](https://fathom.video/share/CkndUGJEPxtBhvdmfepbSJPyF4zHF5xn?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Review the sitemap to identify content for repurposing and propose a redirect strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/CkndUGJEPxtBhvdmfepbSJPyF4zHF5xn?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [**Tara:** Confirm next week's meeting time, as the team will be in Houston.](https://fathom.video/share/CkndUGJEPxtBhvdmfepbSJPyF4zHF5xn?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
